case_title: SUNTRUST BANK VS. OLIVIA GORES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESEARCH TO DETERMINE MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (B) (2). (TRANSACTION ID # 18015033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 18015033) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORES, OLIVIA $16,740.05 PRINCIPAL, $454.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,194.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 18015033)
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 200008546) FILED BY ATTORNEY DELANY, GENNA

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $454.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 18015033) AS TO DEFENDANT GORES, OLIVIA

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 200008546) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST BANK AS TO DEFENDANT GORES, OLIVIA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST BANK AS TO DEFENDANT GORES, OLIVIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2017
